_comment: Local LLM Benchmark config. Add models by appending to 'models'. Add benchmarks by appending to 'benchmarks' (also drop a matching prompts/<name>.txt and optional validators/<name>.sh).

benchmarks.name: oi
benchmarks.notes: Warm-up + greeting. Cold load captured here.

benchmarks.name: snake-pygame
benchmarks.notes: Legacy pygame snake. Validator: syntax check only.

benchmarks.name: snake-html
benchmarks.notes: HTML5 canvas snake. Caxi plays it.

benchmarks.name: todo
benchmarks.notes: Modern todo app. Function + polish scored.

benchmarks.name: calc
benchmarks.notes: Scientific calculator. Tests precedence, parens, float, clear. Deterministic.
